sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 로빈후드는 12억 7,400만 달러의 매출과 5억 5,600만 달러의 순이익을 기록하며 견조한 재무 성과를 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 로빈후드는 누구나 금융 시스템에 참여할 수 있도록 기술을 활용한 간편하고 직관적인 금융 서비스 플랫폼을 제공하는 데 집중하고 있습니다.
고객당 평균 매출(ARPU) 및 로빈후드 골드 구독자 수와 같은 핵심 성과 지표를 통해 경영 성과를 관리하고 있습니다.
과거의 급격한 성장세는 거시경제적 환경 변화로 인해 둔화될 수 있으며, 과거 실적이 미래 성장을 보장하지 않습니다.

riskChanges.text: 유럽 MiCA 규제 도입에 따른 자본 요건 준수 의무가 강화되었으며, 이를 충족하지 못할 경우 사업 운영에 차질이 발생할 수 있습니다.
암호화폐 시장의 변동성, 규제 불확실성, 그리고 유명 인사의 발언에 따른 시장 왜곡 가능성이 사업의 주요 위험 요소로 작용합니다.

businessChanges.text: 미국 내 금융 서비스 및 기술 산업의 성장세가 과거보다 둔화됨에 따라 플랫폼 수요 감소 및 고객 이용률 하락 위험에 직면해 있습니다.
청산소 예치금 요건을 충족하지 못할 경우 청산 포트폴리오가 강제 청산될 수 있는 운영 리스크를 관리하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 당기 매출은 12억 7,400만 달러, 순이익은 5억 5,600만 달러를 기록하며 안정적인 수익성을 유지했습니다.
총자산 414억 5,200만 달러 중 현금 및 현금성 자산은 43억 3,100만 달러를 보유하여 유동성을 확보했습니다.

watchItems.text: 글로벌 규제 강화(MiCA 등)와 거시경제 둔화가 로빈후드의 핵심 수익 모델인 수수료 무료 거래 및 암호화폐 사업의 성장성에 미칠 영향력을 주시해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2025-09-30 revenue = 12억 7,400만 달러 (USD 1.274B; 1,274 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 net income = 5억 5,600만 달러 (USD 0.556B; 556 million), XBRL range 2025-07-01..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 total assets = 414억 5,200만 달러 (USD 41.452B; 41,452 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.
Quarter ended 2025-09-30 cash and cash equivalents = 43억 3,100만 달러 (USD 4.331B; 4,331 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-30.

Risks Related to Our Business We might not grow in line with historical rates. We have grown rapidly since our founding. However, the circumstances that accelerated the growth of our business in the past, including an extended period of general macroeconomic growth in the U.S., as well as growth in the financial services and technology industries, have slowed in recent years and may not exist in the future. You should not rely on our revenue or key business metrics for any previous quarterly or annual period as any indication of our revenue, revenue growth, key business metrics or key business metrics growth in future periods. We might experience declines in the growth of our business (or negative growth) as a result of a number of factors, including slowing demand for our platforms, insufficient growth in the number of customers that utilize our platforms, declines in the level of usage

We face a risk that similar events could occur in the future and, if we are unable to satisfy our deposit requirements, the clearinghouse may cease to act for us and may liquidate our unsettled clearing portfolio. We also need to hold capital and make deposits with respect to certain event contracts in accordance with applicable CFTC regulations and ForecastEx, LLC, Kalshi Klear LLC, and KalshiEx LLC’s Rulebooks for RHD. Further, Robinhood Europe, UAB (“RHEU”) and Bitstamp Europe S.A., are licensed crypto asset service providers under the EU’s Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation (“MiCA”), the provisions of which went into effect as of December 30, 2024. Among other requirements, RHEU and Bitstamp Europe S.A. are subject to mandatory capital requirements that vary based on the services we provide. Revenue Per User (“ARPU”) : We define ARPU as total revenue for a given period divided by the average number of Funded Customers on the last day of that period and the last day of the immediately preceding period. Figures in this Quarterly Report represent ARPU annualized for each three-month period presented. • Robinhood Gold Subscribers: We define a Robinhood Gold Subscriber as a unique person who has at least one account with a Robinhood entity and who, as of the end of the relevant period (a) is subscribed to Robinhood Gold and (b) has made at least one Robinhood Gold subscription fee payment. Glossary Terms • Automated Customer Account Transfer Service (“ACATS”) : A system that automates and standardizes procedures for the transfer of assets in a customer account from one brokerage firm and/or bank to another. • Cash Sweep : We define Cash Sweep as the period-end total amount of par

Overview Robinhood was founded on the belief that everyone should be welcome to participate in our financial system. We are creating modern financial services platforms for everyone, regardless of their wealth, income, or background. Our mission is to democratize finance for all. We use technology to provide access to the financial system in a way that is simple and convenient for our customers. We believe investing should be familiar and welcoming, with a simple design and an intuitive interface, so that customers are empowered to achieve their goals. We started with a revolutionary, bold brand and design in the Robinhood app which makes investing approachable for millions.
